name: Ash Chancellor
xp_description: Gain 1 XP whenever one or more of your Units are Felled in combat.

levels.name: Cinder Tithe
levels.description: Once per Siege Phase, when your Units are Felled, gain 1 Sacrifice.

levels.name: Ashen Recall
levels.description: Once per Preparations Phase, pay 1 Sacrifice to choose a Unit from your Grave and return it to your hand.

levels.name: Pyre Decree
levels.description: Once per Siege Phase, pay 2 Sacrifice to give your Front Line Units +2 Might until end of phase.
